'''radhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:leeringly|leeringly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-dh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leeringly|leeringly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| radhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:radhate|radhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:radhatesher|radhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:radhatesherĂ«m|radhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:radhatero|radhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:radhateshĂ«|radhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:radhateshĂ«m|radhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiradhatero|gokiradhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiradhateshĂ«|gokiradhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiradhateshĂ«m|gokiradhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goradhankerom|goradhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goradhankeshĂ«|goradhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goradhankeshĂ«m|goradhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goradhankeya|goradhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:radhaterom|radhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:radhatemu|radhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:radhateya|radhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiradhaterom|gokiradhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiradhatemu|gokiradhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiradhateya|gokiradhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:radhadhate|radhadhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:radhadhatesher|radhadhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:radhadhatesherĂ«m|radhadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:radhadhatero|radhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:radhadhateshĂ«|radhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:radhadhateshĂ«m|radhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiradhadhatero|gokiradhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiradhadhateshĂ«|gokiradhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiradhadhateshĂ«m|gokiradhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goradhadhankerom|goradhadhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goradhadhankeshĂ«|goradhadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goradhadhankeshĂ«m|goradhadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goradhadhankeya|goradhadhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:radhadhaterom|radhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:radhadhatemu|radhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:radhadhateya|radhadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiradhadhaterom|gokiradhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiradhadhatemu|gokiradhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiradhadhateya|gokiradhadhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:rĂŠdhĂŠte|rĂŠdhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rĂŠdhĂŠtesher|rĂŠdhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m|rĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠdhĂŠtero|rĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|rĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|rĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠdhĂŠtero|gokirĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|gokirĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokirĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorĂŠdhĂŠnkerom|gorĂŠdhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gorĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gorĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorĂŠdhĂŠnkeya|gorĂŠdhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠdhĂŠterom|rĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠdhĂŠtemu|rĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rĂŠdhĂŠteya|rĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠdhĂŠterom|gokirĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠdhĂŠtemu|gokirĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirĂŠdhĂŠteya|gokirĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:rafdhafte|rafdhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rafdhaftesher|rafdhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafdhaftesherĂ«m|rafdhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafdhaftero|rafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rafdhafteshĂ«|rafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafdhafteshĂ«m|rafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafdhaftero|gokirafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirafdhafteshĂ«|gokirafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafdhafteshĂ«m|gokirafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorafdhafnkerom|gorafdhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorafdhafnkeshĂ«|gorafdhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorafdhafnkeshĂ«m|gorafdhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorafdhafnkeya|gorafdhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafdhafterom|rafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafdhaftemu|rafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rafdhafteya|rafdhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafdhafterom|gokirafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafdhaftemu|gokirafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirafdhafteya|gokirafdhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
